verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Holy Lamb Who died for love Holy Spirit Here with us We are humbled On our knees Lord here we are Surrendering

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The redeemer is here And the moment is now His love for us is real With one voice, we cry out Loud and clear The Redeemer is here

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Bridge You are the risen one You are emmanuel With your grace and forgiveness Heal us Lord Jesus We cry out

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The redeemer is here/ You are the risen one And the moment is now/ You are emmanuel His love for us is real/ With your grace and forgiveness With one voice, we cry out/ Heal us Lord Jesus We cry out

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: The redeemer is here/ You are the risen one And the moment is now/ You are emmanuel His love for us is real/ With your grace and forgiveness With one voice, we cry out/ Heal us Lord Jesus We cry out Loud and clear The Redeemer is here
